_meta.description: Full audit of shared/app-shell/src files — classification, decision, action taken, remaining risk, verification command.

files.decision: Public barrel — exports all sub-modules including control-panel.
files.remaining_risk: If new sub-modules are added they must be explicitly exported here.

files.decision: Clean service id registry. No JSX, no API, no business logic.
files.action_taken: No changes. Current phase services: dsh, wlt.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Adding reserved services requires a separate approved task.

files.decision: Clean surface registry. Lists all 7 canonical surfaces including control-panel.
Maps each current-phase service to its allowed surfaces. No JSX, no API, no runtime behavior.
files.action_taken: No changes. dsh maps to all 5 surfaces; wlt maps to app-client and control-panel.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Must stay in sync with services.ts and surfaces.ts.

files.decision: Typed service slot contracts. No DSH/WLT business logic. Pure generic typing.
files.action_taken: No changes. makeServiceSlotContract is correctly abstract.

files.decision: Defines allowed/forbidden app-shell responsibilities. No JSX. Guides future contributors.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Must be kept updated when app-shell scope changes.

files.decision: Defines where screens must live (services/*/frontend/*). Forbidden: shared/app-shell, shared/ui-kit, apps.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Proof files (_skeleton-proof) are not production screens.

files.decision: Defines allowed/forbidden donor extraction. No runtime paths. Evidence-only reference.
Defines how ui-kit must be consumed. Forbids deep imports, direct Tamagui, raw hex, local design systems.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Must be updated if ui-kit API changes.

files.decision: Composition-only layout shell. No DSH/WLT logic. No fetch. No raw hex. RTL support.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.
files.remaining_risk: Low. Inline styles are layout-only (flexbox, overflow), no color.

files.decision: Navigation with 10 typed sections. No business logic. Accepts items as typed props.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.

files.decision: Slot-based top bar composition. No service logic. Accepts all slots as ReactNode.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.

files.decision: React context for service registry injection. No business logic. Context value is typed.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.

files.decision: 10 typed sections, typed meta, helper function. No JSX. No API.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.

files.decision: Service registration (id, label, allowedSections, enabled, ownerBoundary). No stores/orders/payments logic.
files.action_taken: Created in previous task. Verified clean.

files.decision: Barrel for all control-panel exports. Correctly re-exported from src/index.ts.
Composition frame for dashboard/marketing overview. Accepts header, toolbar, children, stateView, dir.
Composition frame for catalogs/admin data tables. Accepts header, toolbar, filters, children, stateView.
Composition frame for operations/support/partners/hr queues.
Composition frame for live operations room. Has side panel and status bar slots.
Composition frame for detail views. Has header, actionBar, children, stateView.
Composition frame for form editors (catalog editor, marketing editor).
Composition frame for review/approval workflows (partners, catalogs).
Composition frame for metrics/KPI views. Has summary strip slot.
Composition frame for settings/platform config. Has settings sub-nav slot.
READ-ONLY composition frame for finance section. Comment explicitly forbids financial mutations. WLT boundary enforced separately.
files.remaining_risk: Low. WLT mutation guard (no-financial-mutation-outside-wlt.mjs) provides runtime enforcement.

files.decision: Barrel for all archetype frames.

mobile_directory.decision: MOBILE_APP_SHELL_NOT_CREATED_BY_DESIGN: Mobile shell is out of scope for current phase.
mobile_directory.activation_condition: MOBILE_APP_SHELL_ALIGNMENT task — only after proven duplication or divergence between app-client, app-partner, app-captain, app-field.
mobile_directory.action_taken: None. Directory does not exist and must not be created in this task.

summary.verdict: shared/app-shell/src is clean. All files are in correct position and have correct scope.
